tapCorrection.notes: First-pass moderate lane-correction target for a short tap in the opening window.

holdTravel.notes: First-pass sustained lateral travel target for the opening window.

settleAfterRelease.notes: First-pass settle window for returning to neutral after release.

reversalCross.notes: First-pass center-cross target for a quick evasive reversal.

shotDelayWhileMoving.notes: First-pass movement-plus-fire delay target for an opening-window shot.

postShotTravel.notes: First-pass travel target after firing while moving.

maxFrameStep.notes: First-pass smoothness anchor for visible per-sample travel.
